# Veila Tarot (veilatarot.com)

> Bilingual (English / Thai) tarot reading site. Free in-browser card readings plus written reading pages for love, career, and monthly zodiac love themes, and meaning pages for all 78 tarot cards. Framed as reflection, not fortune-telling. No account, no payment.

Every page listed below exists in English at the path shown; most have a Thai twin under /th/ with the same slug.

## Reading apps (interactive, in-browser)

- [Celtic Cross Reading](https://veilatarot.com/celtic-cross-reading/): 10-card Celtic Cross draw, EN/TH toggle (Thai at /th/celtic-cross-reading/)
- [Quick Love Reading](https://veilatarot.com/quick-love-reading/): 3-card love draw with 100+ selectable questions
- [Quick Career Reading](https://veilatarot.com/career/reading/): 3-card career draw

## Love readings

- [Love readings hub](https://veilatarot.com/love-readings/): 49 written 3-card readings for specific love questions (English)
- [Example — Will they come back?](https://veilatarot.com/love-readings/will-they-come-back/)
- [Example — Does he miss me?](https://veilatarot.com/love-readings/does-he-miss-me/)
- [Love questions hub (EN)](https://veilatarot.com/scenarios/): 137 English love/relationship question pages, each paired with a Thai twin
- [Example — Will I marry this person?](https://veilatarot.com/scenarios/will-i-marry-this-person/)
- [Thai love questions hub](https://veilatarot.com/th/scenarios/): 148 Thai-language love/relationship question pages
- [Example (TH) — เขาจะกลับมาไหม](https://veilatarot.com/th/scenarios/will-he-come-back/)

## Career readings

- [Career hub](https://veilatarot.com/career/): 23 written career/money question readings, each with a Thai twin under /th/career/
- [Example — Should I quit?](https://veilatarot.com/career/should-i-quit/)
- [Example — Will money improve?](https://veilatarot.com/career/will-money-improve/)

## Zodiac love tarot (updated monthly)

- [Zodiac Love Tarot hub](https://veilatarot.com/zodiac-love-tarot/): a fresh 3-card love reading per zodiac sign each month, all 12 signs
- [Example — Aries](https://veilatarot.com/zodiac-love-tarot/aries/)
- [Thai hub — ดูดวงความรักตามราศี](https://veilatarot.com/th/zodiac-love-tarot/)

## Card meanings (78 cards, EN + TH)

- [Major Arcana index](https://veilatarot.com/major-arcana/)
- [Minor Arcana index](https://veilatarot.com/minor-arcana/)
- [Example card — The Lovers](https://veilatarot.com/cards/the-lovers/)
- [Example card (TH) — คนรัก](https://veilatarot.com/th/cards/the-lovers/)

## Daily

- [Daily tarot card](https://veilatarot.com/daily-tarot-card/): one-card daily pull plus a written collective 3-card reading published each morning (Bangkok time)

## Guides & about

- [Guides hub](https://veilatarot.com/guides/)
- [The Celtic Cross spread](https://veilatarot.com/celtic-cross-tarot/)
- [How to ask a tarot question](https://veilatarot.com/guides/how-to-ask-a-tarot-question/)
- [Tarot spreads for relationships](https://veilatarot.com/guides/tarot-spreads-for-relationships/)
- [Thai guides hub — วิธีดูไพ่ยิปซี](https://veilatarot.com/th/guides/)
- [Yes/No tarot](https://veilatarot.com/yes-no-tarot/)
- [About Veila](https://veilatarot.com/about/)

## Full index

- [All pages with titles and descriptions](https://veilatarot.com/llms-full.txt)
- [Human-readable site index](https://veilatarot.com/all-tarot-pages/)
